<context>
This is the full AI context for mubaidr.js.org — a personal portfolio, blog, and consulting landing page for Muhammad Ubaid Raza.

Key facts:
- 13+ years of software engineering experience
- 125+ projects delivered with 100% client satisfaction
- Available for new projects (next opening: April 2025)
- Response time: ~3 hours | Timezone: GMT+5
- Payment: 20% upfront, rest on milestones
- Pricing: MVP $5K-$15K USD | Architecture audit $1.5K-$3K USD | Hourly $100-$125 USD
- Works with: Startups, SMEs, Enterprise, Agencies, Individual Founders
- Current focus: Infrastructure as Code (IaC), Cloud-native tooling, AI-assisted development workflows
- Tech stack: Vue.js/Nuxt, React/Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, AWS
- Open source maintainer of gem-team: multi-agent AI development framework
</context>

<featured_projects>
1. ParagonSquare.ai
   Type: Multi-marketplace SaaS platform
   Role: Lead Full-Stack Developer
   Team: 3 people
   Status: Active (2024-Present)
   Description: Next-generation multi-marketplace platform offering 0% commission through subscription model, combining auctions, products, services, and future vacation rentals.
   Technologies: Custom Framework, Stripe, NOWPayments, Font Awesome, Termly.io
   Stats: 28K+ signups, 600K+ visitors across 5 countries, $18,696 raised
   Key Features: 4 marketplaces, 72-hr funds release, 3-way chat dispute resolution, KYC verification, 43+ service categories, 50+ product categories, multi-currency payments (Stripe + crypto)
   Business Impact: 0% commission model disrupting traditional 10-25% fees, IPO planned on Bahamas Stock Exchange (BISX)

2. AI Document Chat Platform
   Type: Enterprise AI SaaS
   Role: Lead Full-Stack Developer & AI Integration Specialist
   Team: 4 people
   Status: Active (2024-Present)
   Description: Interactive web application with document repository and AI-based chat that responds to queries based on uploaded PDF/Word documents, including scanned copies with OCR support.
   Technologies: Next.js, React, TypeScript, OpenAI API, LangChain, Tesseract.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3, SAML/OAuth, Docker
   Stats: 50K+ documents processed, 200K+ queries handled, 5K+ users, 95% query accuracy rate
   Key Features: Document repository with PDF/Word support, AI-powered chat, OCR for scanned docs, admin dashboard with analytics, SSO authentication, real-time query processing, multi-document context
   Business Impact: 90% reduction in document search time, enterprise-grade scalability

3. WhatsApp Chat Summary
   Type: AI-powered web application
   Status: Active
   Description: Platform that connects to WhatsApp accounts via QR code to generate AI-powered summaries, enables Q&A about conversations, and provides suggested replies.
   Technologies: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, pgvector, Google Generative AI, OpenAI, Socket.io
   Key Features: QR code WhatsApp authentication, AI chat summarization, RAG-based Q&A, suggested replies, multi-phone support, real-time SSE, vector-based semantic search

4. Vacation Rental Marketplace
   Type: Real-time booking platform
   Description: WebSocket-powered platform with 3D Secure payments, fraud detection, and real-time booking management.
   Stats: 10K+ properties, 50K+ guests, 99.9% uptime
</featured_projects>

<professional_journey>
Current: Senior Software Engineer — Freelance/Remote (2020-Present)
- 20+ projects delivered with 100% client satisfaction
- Reduced application load times by 60% through optimization
- Mentored 15+ junior developers

Previous:
- Full-Stack Developer — Tech Solutions Inc, Karachi (2018-2020)
  - Led migration of legacy system to modern tech stack
  - Improved system performance by 40%
  - Increased code coverage to 85% through automated testing

- Software Developer — Digital Agency Pro, Lahore (2015-2018)
  - Delivered 50+ client websites on time and within budget
  - Reduced development time by 30% through reusable components
  - Achieved 98% client retention rate

- Junior Developer — StartUp Hub, Islamabad (2012-2015)

Technologies:
- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, PHP, Python, SQL, HTML, CSS/SCSS
- Frameworks: Nuxt.js, Next.js, Vue.js, React, Laravel, Express.js, NestJS
- Frontend: Tailwind CSS, Vite, Webpack, shadcn/ui, Nuxt UI
- Testing: Vitest, Playwright, Cypress, PHPUnit, Pest
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, SQLite, Redis
- DevOps: Docker, AWS, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Linux
- Build: TurboRepo, Nx, ESLint, Prettier, Stylelint
</professional_journey>

<case_studies>
1. Marketplace Disruption
   Problem: Marketplace startup needed to disrupt 10-25% commission model
   Solution: Built subscription-based platform with 4 marketplaces, 72-hr funds release, 3-way dispute resolution, KYC verification
   Result: 28K+ signups, 600K+ visitors, $18K+ raised, IPO-track

2. Enterprise Document Search
   Problem: Enterprise struggled with 50K+ unsearchable documents
   Solution: AI chat platform with OCR, vector search, and RAG
   Result: 50K+ docs processed, 90% faster search, 95% query accuracy, 200K+ queries

3. WhatsApp Insight Extraction
   Problem: Teams unable to extract insights from WhatsApp chats
   Solution: AI-powered platform with QR auth, chat summarization, RAG Q&A, reply suggestions
   Result: Multi-phone support, real-time SSE, pgvector search

4. Vacation Rental Scaling
   Problem: Needed real-time features and secure payments at scale
   Solution: WebSocket-powered platform with 3D Secure payments and fraud detection
   Result: 10K+ properties, 50K+ guests, 99.9% uptime
</case_studies>

<blog_posts>
Technical AI & Agent Systems:
- "Production-Grade AI Agents Are Not Prompts — They Are Systems" — Why real agents need orchestration layers, not prompt chains
- "DAG-Based AI Orchestration: Why Linear Agent Pipelines Break at Scale" — DAG beats sequential chains for production
- "I Stopped Building Features First — I Now Design Execution Systems First" — Why execution-first produces better software
- "Multi-Agent Memory Systems: What Actually Works in Production" — Structured state, controlled injection, lifecycle management
- "Async-First Engineering in 2026: Why I Avoid Most Technical Calls" — Async workflows for senior engineering
- "Laravel + AI Agent Systems: Building Hybrid Backends in 2026" — Laravel as orchestration backend for AI agents
- "AI-First Development: Building the Future of Software in 2026" — Autonomous agents and intelligent code generation
- "AI-Powered Development Tools in 2026: A Complete Guide" — AI-first tools transforming software development

- "Nuxt 3 to Nuxt 4 Migration Guide: Complete Checklist for 2026" — Step-by-step migration with codemod tools
- "Nuxt 4 SSR Performance Optimization: Complete Guide to Core Web Vitals" — Caching, data fetching, hybrid rendering
- "Meta-Frameworks in 2026: The New Default for Web Development" — Why Next.js, Nuxt, SvelteKit dominate
- "React Compiler and the End of Manual Memoization" — React Compiler automating memoization in 2026
- "React Server Components Deep Dive" — RSC with practical examples and migration strategies
- "Vue 3 Composition API: Best Practices for Modern Development" — Effective patterns for Composition API
- "Next.js 14 App Router Complete Guide" — Server Components, streaming, caching strategies

- "TypeScript 2026: New Features Every Developer Should Know" — Enhanced inference, module resolution
- "End-to-End Type Safety: The Complete Guide for 2026" — TypeScript, Zod, modern tools
